visual.name: ParetoChartPro
visual.description: Professional Pareto Chart with cumulative line, 80% reference, and Free/Pro tiers.

dataRoles.name: category
dataRoles.description: Category field to rank (customer, product, SKU…)

dataRoles.name: measure
dataRoles.description: Numeric measure to concentrate (sales, revenue, liters…)

binSizePct.description: Each bar represents this % of entities. Free tier fixed at 5%. Pro: 1–20%.

trimLower.description: Remove the bottom N% of entities (outliers) before calculating bins.

trimUpper.description: Remove the top N% of entities (outliers) before calculating bins.

ref1Value.description: Draw a reference line where cumulative value reaches this %.
